title: The Legends of Rocks, Roger, and Oden Surface
description: On pages 6–9, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Orochi, Wano Citizens, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8 as The story turns to Oden’s past, showing how his life, Whitebeard, Roger, and Orochi shaped Wano’s tragedy.
scene: The story turns to Oden’s past, showing how his life, Whitebeard, Roger, and Orochi shaped Wano’s tragedy.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What a wonderful day! It's almost as if it's celebrating me.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Muha Haha!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Perfect banquet weather!

dialogue.speaker: Orochi
dialogue.text: It's all for you, Lord Orochi.:D

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This year, it will fall to kyoshiro to guard the capital. Let him know at your leisure.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Yes!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: poor guy. Sad thatt he won't get to participate.

dialogue.speaker: Wano Citizens
dialogue.text: This harbor, the largest in Wano,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: has a large quay, atop which the trees stand, resplendent in their fall colors.

dialogue.speaker: Orochi
dialogue.text: Shogun Orochi~ (1)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Bon voyage!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Be care- full!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Truly a beautiful sight. The fiery leaves dance down, seeing off the departing ships.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Bring the sake! Let's drink to these leaves!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Lord Orochi! Please, not until we've met Lord Kaido!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll matters not! He's bound to be sloshed already!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A grand banquet with 40,000 in attendance! We'll have a blast!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Once a year, on Onigashima,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The two great leaders that rule wano meet,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: and a grand banquet, with both their armies in attendance, is held.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: mean- while, at the capital

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Drink! Sing!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Tonight is the Fire Festival!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The only time of the year that the ban on drinking is lifted!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Bring out the sake!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Get me some Apple Candies!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Come on, hurry!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Wait! My bangs aren't falling right today!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Dance!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: What a clear, blue sky!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We should see a beautiful full moon tonight!

dialogue.speaker: Wano Citizens
dialogue.text: The seasons of Wano

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Can vary drastically from province to province,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And the weather can change rapidly in a very localized way.

dialogue.speaker: Wano Citizens
dialogue.text: Wano Country, upon

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Tokage Harbor

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Ren- Decoves point for the final battle

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Kim! We can't do this tonight!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: We've gotta change the date!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Kine- Mon!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: There isn't a single ship here!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That cat... did he not make it in time?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You're right! I thought we'd already taken over Udon!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: But even the mines were deserted!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Where are our 4,000 men?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: The

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: This harbor...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: There's signs that it's been attacked!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Oden and the Old Era storyline with 48 dialogue beats. The story turns to Oden’s past, showing how his life, Whitebeard, Roger, and Orochi shaped Wano’s tragedy.
